seoTitle: Castle Donnington vs Catani — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Castle Donnington and Catani. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Castle Donnington vs Catani: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castle Donnington and Catani.
heading: Castle Donnington vs Catani — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castle Donnington, Victoria and Catani, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castle Donnington has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Catani (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castle Donnington or Catani safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castle Donnington has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Catani scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castle Donnington scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Catani scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castle Donnington or Catani?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castle Donnington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
